ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear-Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear-Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Continued To Feb-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: ppearances: Raymond Chan for and with Anne Kirueshkin (Executor).

Ms. Kirueshkin stated that she gave the matter to the accountant, that the accounting was prepared but not current because some mistakes were made with regard to the sales of the securities and that the bank statements were coming in late. The matter was continued to February 24, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court directed Mr. Chan to file the Substitution of Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear-Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Continued To Jan-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Kirueshkin for Nick Buick. Raymond Chan (Counsel) also appeared.

Ms. Kirueshkin stated that Mr. Chan was brought in to assist in the matter and that she did not have the accounting as the stocks were just sold. Mr. Chan provided background as to his experience in probate law, stated that he would be assisting but not substituting in, and that he would file an Association of Counsel. The Court stated that it received written inquiry from one of the Beneficiaries, that the petition for Final Distribution needed to be filed and that there could be a set aside/reserve for payment of the taxes. Ms. Kirueshkin stated that she would take responsibility for any penalties with regard to the tax returns. The Court requested Mr. Chan file a Substition of Attorney. The matter was continued to January 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the Petition for Final Distribution. Ms. Kirueshkin is to turn over all files to Mr. Chan before January 11, 2010. The Order to Show Cause is discharged.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear-Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Continued To Dec-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator to appear and show cause as to why she should not be held in contempt for failure to file the Petition for Final Distribution. The return date is January 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204. Sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will commence on January 28, 2010 if said documents are not filed by that hearing date.

Anne Kirueshkin appeared after the matter had been called. Ms. Kirueshkin stated that she had the Status Report and the Notice of Hearing ready to go, that a couple of tax returns needed to be completed, that the securities finaly got sold, that the Estate was now all in cash and that she could file the Petition for Final Distribution when the taxes were done. The Court expressed concern about the matter having been continued several times, about Ms. Kirueshkin's medical procedure which is to take place in January and suggested obtaining Counsel to represent her. The Court also stated that the Petition for Final Distribrution could be filed with a reserve on the tax issue. The matter was continued to December 30, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of an Attorney. If the petition is not filed and no one else is coming in, a filing deadline will be set on that date. The previous Order to Show Cause is vacated.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear-Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Continued To Dec-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Kirueshkin in Propria Persona.

Ms. Kirueshkin informed the Court that she was dealing with a medical condition and stated that she was planning to file a status report and a petition for a preliminary distribution. The matter was continued to December 23, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court suggested Ms. Kirueshkin seek assistance.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear-Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Continued To Dec-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Kirueshkin in pro per.

Ms. Kirueshkin requested a continuance noting that the hold up has been due to her health issues. The matter was continued to December 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Kirueshkin stated that she would have either the petition for final distribution on file or a status report by that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
